subcodes.title: Words to Mrs C. H. Wise in 1912
subcodes.first_line: It is natural when such a young man departs from life one is greatly affected. I had a son who passed away, but I never felt sad at all. Why? Because I fully realized that I did not lose him.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @soul; spirit after death, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @relationship of the soul to the body, @second birth
